title: Designing a Sales Persona for a B2B Company
scenario: Create a sales persona for a 40-year-old business owner named David. David is responsible for making purchasing decisions for his company and is looking for solutions that can help him improve his bottom line. Describe David's demographics, needs, pain points, and behaviors in a concise and detailed way. Use a format that includes sections for demographics, needs, pain points, and behaviors. Keep the description under 225 words.
constraints: Must use a format with sections for demographics, needs, pain points, and behaviors

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the sales persona adhere to the format and word limit requirements?
Is the sales persona clear and easy to understand?
Does the sales persona include all necessary information about the target sales persona?
